summary: Iteration 74: Avatar Feature Testing - All frontend features working correctly. Tested: (1) Campaign cards with View Avatar buttons, (2) Avatar modal with Copy/Download buttons, (3) Art Gallery with Avatars filter tab, (4) Gallery player showing AVATAR badge, (5) CampaignDetail avatar section with View Avatar button and Presenter badge, (6) Avatar lightbox from CampaignDetail.

details: ✓ Login flow works - redirects to dashboard
✓ Marketing page loads with 55 campaign cards
✓ Found 9 'View Avatar' buttons on campaign cards (data-testid='view-avatar-{campaignId}')
✓ Avatar modal opens when clicking View Avatar button
✓ Avatar modal shows avatar image correctly
✓ Avatars filter tab found and works (data-testid='gallery-type-avatar')
✓ Gallery shows 9 avatar assets when Avatars filter is active
✓ AVATAR badge visible in gallery player when avatar asset selected
✓ View Avatar button found in CampaignDetail (data-testid='view-avatar-btn')
✓ Presenter badge found for presenter mode campaigns
✓ Avatar lightbox opens from CampaignDetail with Copy/Download buttons

seed_data_creation: None - used existing campaigns with 9 avatars backfilled
context_for_next_testing_agent: Avatar feature fully implemented and working. Key data-testids: view-avatar-{campaignId} on campaign cards, avatar-modal for main modal, close-avatar-modal for close button, filter-gallery for Art Gallery button, gallery-type-avatar for Avatars filter tab, campaign-avatar-section in CampaignDetail, view-avatar-btn in CampaignDetail. App has 55 campaigns with 9 having avatar_url populated. Presenter badge shows for campaigns with video_mode='presenter'. The dark luxury theme with gold (#C9A84C) accents is consistent throughout.
